expo.name: MyKliq
expo.description: MyKliq is a private social media app built for close-knit friend groups. Rank your friends, share photos, videos, stories, and polls, send incognito messages, earn Kliq Koins rewards, and customize your entire experience with themes and backgrounds — all in a private, invite-only space free from ads and algorithms.

infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MyKliq uses your camera to take profile photos, capture photos and videos for posts and stories, record video for live streams, and make video calls with friends. Photos and videos are only uploaded when you choose to share them.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: MyKliq accesses your photo library so you can choose existing photos and videos to share in posts and stories. Media is only uploaded when you select and share it.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: MyKliq saves photos and videos to your library only when you explicitly tap the save button.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: MyKliq uses your microphone to record audio when you capture videos for posts and stories, during live streams, and during video calls with friends. Audio is only recorded during active use.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: MyKliq uses your location to show nearby meetups, let you check in at a location, and help friends find events happening close to you. Location is only accessed while you are using the app.

plugins.cameraPermission: MyKliq uses your camera to take profile photos, capture photos and videos for posts and stories, record video for live streams, and make video calls with friends. Photos and videos are only uploaded when you choose to share them.

plugins.photosPermission: MyKliq accesses your photo library so you can choose existing photos and videos to share in posts and stories. Media is only uploaded when you select and share it.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: MyKliq uses your location to show nearby meetups, let you check in at a location, and help friends find events happening close to you. Location is only accessed while you are using the app.

extra.appStoreDescription: MyKliq is a private social media app built for close-knit friend groups. Rank your friends, share photos, videos, stories, and polls, send incognito messages, earn Kliq Koins rewards, and customize your entire experience with themes and backgrounds — all in a private, invite-only space free from ads and algorithms.
extra.appStoreKeywords: private social media, close friends, friend group, invite only, social circle, private sharing, kliq, friend ranking, incognito messaging, kliq koins
extra.releaseNotes: Initial release of MyKliq — your private social circle. Share photos, videos, stories, and polls with your closest friends. Earn Kliq Koins, send incognito messages, and customize your experience with themes and backgrounds.
